svg.text: ACT 4 — DAWN GOLD · Soft · Renewed · Hope
• Same space as Act 3 — but CLEAN
• Large archway: frames the Child's entrance
• Door now open or ajar (contrasts Act 3)
• NOT as intense as Act 1 — softer, muted
• Token on board catches direct sunlight
• King is in softer light — accepting, not lit
Child walks through archway, holding token.
Camera: slow tracking follow from behind arch.
★ Most important shot. Animate with care.
Wide shot: silhouettes bow as child passes.
King at edge of frame, watching, tears.
Can simplify crowd as dark silhouettes.
Close push-in on game board. Token rests.
Sunrise light catches it — warm, resolute.
Fade to warm white (NOT black). 5 seconds.
This closes the same way it opened — the
board is still there. The cycle continues.
Story opens and closes with the game board.
Act 4: warm gold, open courtyard, dawn
Same colors — different meaning. The King
has changed; the world looks similar.
• Child's walk: slow, purposeful. No rush.
• Token glow intensifies as sun hits it (SH17)
• King: minimal animation. His stillness = peace.
• Fade-out: to warm white, not black
Not sad. Not triumphant. Simply complete.
